Quest

A New Beginning: Part 1

StarterNo explicit starter body

Defeat 10 Seeker Lvl 0, Seeker Lvl 1, Seeker Lvl 2 in Hyperion

Start Here

  • No explicit starter body was linked in Bodies.mission; this quest may start automatically, from another quest, or from a hidden trigger.

Where To Go

  • System: Hyperion

What To Kill / Collect

  • Targets: Seeker Lvl 0, Seeker Lvl 1, Seeker Lvl 2

Reward tableMission Tutorial 1

Resolved from Mission Tutorial 1.

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Hyperion.
  2. Defeat 10 Seeker Lvl 0, Seeker Lvl 1, Seeker Lvl 2.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock A New Beginning: Part 2.

Quest Text

Description

Lieutenant Kreiger: “Great, yet another refugee from Azuron. The last thing I needed… this sector have been flooded by your kind lately. I got some bad news, I doubt you’ll even last one day… If you want to survive you need to learn how to fight, and you need to learn fast. If you want any help you’ll have to earn it.

Go kill 10 of those so called “Seekers” that are swarming the area. And by the way, a small hint: they are cannibals so don’t even think of surrendering.”

Completion

Lieutenant Kreiger: “You’re still alive? That’s quite surprising.. I thought you’d be someones dinner by now. Here’s some steel, resources are essential for long term survival. I’m going to have you prove your worth.”
